name: 22_Sentiment_Analysis_LSTM_IMDb_DL
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuanzisha mradi wa uchambuzi wa hisia ukitumia mfano wa LSTM na seti ya data ya IMDb? Tafadhali tekeleza usafishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji. Tumia embeddings za maneno kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na uhifadhi embeddings hizi chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Kisha tumia embeddings hizi kama ingizo la mfano wa LSTM, ambao unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi ripoti ya uainishaji kwa `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`. Unda Jupyter Notebook iliyohifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb` na usanifu wa mfano na mchakato wa mafunzo umeonyeshwa. Pia, hifadhi mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi kwa `results/figures/training_curves.png`. Embeddings zilizofunzwa awali (mfano, Word2Vec au GloVe) zinapendekezwa ili kuboresha utendaji wa mfano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya hakiki za filamu ya "IMDb" inatumika.
Usafishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji.
Embeddings za maneno zinatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa hisia na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha usanifu wa mfano na uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa mafunzo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb`.
Mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/training_curves.png`.

preferences.criteria: Embeddings za maneno zinapaswa kuwa zilizofunzwa awali (mfano, Word2Vec au GloVe) ili kutumia maarifa ya kisemantiki yaliyopo.
Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kuwa na maelezo mazuri, ikifanya iwe rahisi kwa wengine kuelewa usanifu wa mfano na mchakato wa mafunzo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya hakiki za filamu ya "IMDb" inatumika.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The provided evidence does not demonstrate that the IMDb movie review dataset is actually used. The workspace structure shows directories for models and results, but no dataset files or loading logic. The `data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with a dummy `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}`. There is no code referencing IMDb data, downloading it, or processing real movie reviews. The trajectory evidence mentions "Load IMDb dataset" succeeded, but this is stated as reference only and not decisive; the actual code files do not implement this loading.

judge_stats.criteria: Usafishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement for data cleaning implementation in `src/data_loader.py` is not satisfied. The provided file content shows only a minimal placeholder implementation with no actual data cleaning logic. The `load_dataset()` function returns a dummy dictionary, and the `build_transforms()` function returns a list of strings for augmentation, not text cleaning. Crucially, the trajectory evidence confirms that the actual cleaning operation (the `clean_text()` function) failed to execute due to a `UnicodeDecodeError` when reading the source file, and no cleaned data was saved. Therefore, the required functionality for removing stop words and punctuation is not implemented or executed.

judge_stats.criteria: Embeddings za maneno zinatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement states that word embeddings are used to convert text to numerical format and are stored under `models/saved_models/`. The provided key evidence from the project files (`data_loader.py` and `model.py`) shows only minimal placeholder implementations with no actual embedding generation, loading, or saving logic. The trajectory evidence references steps for training, validating, and loading embeddings, but these are environment feedback for reference only and not decisive evidence. Crucially, the project structure shows an empty `models/saved_models/` directory, and no code in the provided files demonstrates the creation or storage of embeddings in that location.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa hisia na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided content of `src/model.py` does not contain an actual LSTM model implementation. The file contains only a minimal placeholder with requirement definitions and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no LSTM class definition, no PyTorch/TensorFlow imports, no layer definitions (embedding, LSTM, linear), and no forward method—all essential components for a functional LSTM sentiment analysis model. The trajectory evidence indicates the file was edited and executed without errors, but the file content itself lacks the required model implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>
The classification report file `results/metrics/classification_report.txt` contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, indicating it does not contain actual evaluation metrics such as precision, recall, or F1-scores. The requirement for a saved classification report is not met, as the file lacks meaningful content.
